name: Pheasant Stock-
recipeInstructions:
1. Preheat the oven to 450°F.
2. Pour the vegetable oil into a roasting pan with the reserved bones and carcasses. Roast until well browned, stirring occasionally, for about 30 minutes.
3. Add the remaining stock ingredients except the wine and continue to roast for 10 more minutes.
4. Transfer solids to a stockpot, discarding any fat.
5. Place the roasting pan over high heat and add the wine. Scrape away all browned bits and boil, stirring until the wine is nearly evaporated.
6. Add 1 cup of water, and add this liquid to the stockpot.
7. Add cold water to cover, bring slowly to a boil, and skim well.
8. Lower heat and simmer uncovered for 3 to 4 hours.
9. Strain, pressing down on solids to extract all of the liquid; discard solids. Cool to room temperature and refrigerate.
10. When chilled, lift off any solidified fat from the surface and discard.
